title: Contract-04: Cross-Platform Harness System (Windows & macOS)
review_date: หลังครบ 3 TDD cycles
constraints: Cross-Platform: Must execute cleanly on both Windows (CMD/PowerShell/Git Bash) and macOS/Linux (Zsh/Bash).
No Shell Dependencies: Must not rely on Bash-only utilities (jq, xmlstarlet, /tmp, /dev/null). Use standard Python libraries (pathlib, tempfile, subprocess).
Windows Robustness: Any subprocess call to npm/npx on Windows must be wrapped in cmd.exe /c automatically.
Zero Regression: Existing sensors (m-cov, m-hex) must continue to pass 100% when invoked via the new runner.
definition_of_done: [x] 1. [Phase 1] Create install_hooks.py, pre_commit.py, and pre_push.py cross-platform guardrails.
[x] 2. [Phase 2] Create m-tdd.py sensor and unified harness-runner.py CLI.
[x] 3. [Phase 3] Create test_harness.py automated tests and verify 100% pass rate.
[x] 4. [Phase 3] Update AGENTS.md with cross-platform instructions and commands.
[x] 5. Confirm completion with user and generate Handoff report.
